services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the enterprise RAG web/API application and enforces authenticated access

services.name: Azure AI Foundry
services.description: Orchestrates the RAG workflow (routing, prompt assembly, tool calls) across retrieval and generation

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Runs GPT-5 for grounded answer generation from retrieved context

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Performs hybrid retrieval (vector similarity + keyword/BM25) for RAG grounding

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Stores enterprise documents and chunked content used for indexing into search

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Semantic cache for repeated user intents, retrieved contexts, and final answers

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Provides user authentication and token issuance for the App Service

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores secrets/keys (e.g., OpenAI and Search credentials) used by the application runtime

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Central collection point for application metrics and logs from the primary compute service

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and queries collected logs for diagnostics, auditing, and operational analysis

connections.label: Authenticate users and issue tokens for App Service access (OIDC/OAuth2)
Retrieve runtime secrets (Search/OpenAI endpoints, keys, and configuration)
Check semantic cache for prior answers and cached retrieval contexts
Submit RAG orchestration request with user prompt, auth context, and conversation state
Provide documents/chunks for ingestion and indexing (content source for search index updates)
Execute hybrid retrieval query (keyword + vector) and request top-K grounded passages
Return ranked results with passages, metadata, and relevance scores for grounding
Call GPT-5 with system instructions, user question, and retrieved context to generate grounded response
Return completion with citations-ready content and model output tokens
Write semantic cache entry keyed by normalized intent/context and store final answer with citations
Return finalized grounded answer, citations, and trace identifiers to the application
Emit application metrics and request traces (latency, cache hit rate, retrieval/generation timings)
Route collected logs and metrics to Log Analytics workspace for querying and alerting

workflow.description: User accesses the RAG application and is authenticated to obtain an access token.
Application loads required secrets and configuration to call downstream AI and retrieval services.
Application checks semantic cache to short-circuit repeated questions and reuse previously grounded responses.
On cache miss, application submits a RAG orchestration request to Azure AI Foundry.
Orchestrator performs hybrid retrieval against AI Search to gather the most relevant grounding passages.
Orchestrator calls GPT-5 with retrieved context to generate a grounded answer suitable for citation.
Orchestrator stores the final response and associated context in Redis to improve performance for future similar queries.
Application returns the grounded answer to the user and records operational telemetry for monitoring.

metadata.prompt: An enterprise RAG application with Azure AI Foundry for orchestration, Azure AI Search with hybrid vector and keyword retrieval, Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for generation, Azure Cache for Redis for semantic caching, and App Service with Entra ID authentication
